description: The pipeline must produce an array of these objects, one per account. If no suitable trend is found for an account, the entry should still exist with a null trend_id, no_match_reason explaining why, and no script.

trend_id.description: The matched trend ID from trends.json. Null if no suitable trend was found.

template_id.description: The selected template ID from templates.json. Null if no trend was matched.

trend_match_rationale.description: Why this trend was selected for this account. Reference specific attributes of both the trend and the account profile.

template_selection_rationale.description: Why this template structure fits the account-trend combination.

alternative_considered.description: What was the second-best trend or template option and why it was not chosen.

fit_score.description: Confidence score for the match. 0.0 = forced fit, 1.0 = perfect natural alignment. Be honest — not everything will be a 0.9.

script.description: The generated script broken into sections matching the template structure. Null if no trend matched.

dialogue.description: The actual spoken script text for this section.

stage_direction.description: Visual or performance notes for this section.

language_notes.description: Any notes on language mix, slang usage, or tone calibration specific to this script.

no_match_reason.description: If no trend was matched, explain why none of the available trends fit this account. Null if a match was made.
